typography.pairing_strategy: Outfit provides a modern, geometric tech feel. IBM Plex Sans provides immense clarity for dense data and forms on mobile devices.

color_palette.rules: Avoid gradients. Use solid high-contrast colors. Do not use generic grey, use slate which has a subtle blue tint.

spacing_and_layout.grid_strategy: MODE B (Control Room): Mobile-first grid-cols-1. Desktop up to grid-cols-4. Every pixel utilized. Overlapping not required for dashboards.
spacing_and_layout.alignment: Strict left-alignment for forms and reading content. Center alignment is banned unless for empty states.

components.buttons: Action-oriented. Use primary brand color for main CTAs. Full width on mobile. Must have active:scale-[0.98] transition.
components.cards: Flat design. No default shadows. bg-white with 1px border-slate-200. On hover: -translate-y-1 shadow-md border-slate-300.
components.kanban_and_pipeline: DO NOT use drag-and-drop on mobile. Present pipelines as a list or tap-to-switch tabs. Use bold 'Move to Next Stage' buttons inside detail views. Dropdowns over typing.
components.forms: Heavily customized Shadcn UI. Inputs must have strict focus states (focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-600) and high contrast for outdoor legibility.
components.navigation: Header must have a solid background (bg-white border-b). No glassmorphism as it causes data refraction for field workers.
components.icons: Use lucide-react. Stroke width 2 on mobile for better tap targeting and visibility.

motion.micro_interactions: Hover states on cards (slight lift), active states on buttons (scale down). No complex parallax.

image_urls.description: Professional headshots for executive, manager, and HR roles.
Portraits for mechanics and field technicians.
Fallback brand logo for Servall if text-based logo is not sufficient.

accessibility_and_testing.test_ids: All interactive elements MUST have a data-testid attribute (e.g., data-testid='submit-lead-button'). Use kebab-case.
accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure minimum 4.5:1 contrast ratio. Use slate-900 for primary text on white backgrounds.

instructions_to_main_agent: Design MUST be strictly mobile-first. Target non-technical staff and field teams.
Use large tap targets (minimum 44x44px for buttons).
Replace Kanban drag-and-drop with a vertical list layout on mobile. Use prominent action buttons (e.g., 'Move to Next Stage') in a bottom fixed sheet or modal instead of dragging.
Dashboards must be clutter-free. Use 2-column or 1-column layouts on mobile for KPIs.
Implement Role-Based routing (CEO, Manager, Executive, HR) with simple filtering.
Use Shadcn UI primarily. Dropdowns are preferred over typing inputs.
Avoid glassmorphism. Stick to solid colors (bg-white) and high contrast for legibility in outdoor environments.
